stores.store_name: Casey Indianhead Golf Course Restaurant Delivery Service

sections.combo_note: Make it a COMBO for an extra $3.50
combo_options: Choose 2: Toast, Grits or Steamed Rice

items.name: Early Bird Sandwich
items.description: One egg with your choice of sausage, ham or bacon, and American cheese, served on an English muffin with Hashbrowns.

items.name: Bagel Sandwich
items.description: One egg with your choice of sausage, ham or bacon, and American cheese on a Bagel with Hashbrowns.

items.name: French Connection
items.description: Our special French toast, two eggs cooked to order, with your choice of sausage, ham or bacon and Hashbrowns.

items.description: Two eggs cooked to order, with your choice of sausage, ham or bacon and Hashbrowns.

items.name: Duffer's Choice

items.name: Steak & Eggs

items.name: T-Bone & Eggs
items.description: A grilled breakfast 16oz T-Bone steak with two eggs cooked to order, with Hashbrowns.

items.name: Denver Omelet

items.description: Three eggs with grilled chicken breast, tomato, spinach, and mozzarella cheese.

items.description: Three eggs with imitation crab meat and baby shrimp, sauteed onions, and melted cheddar cheese.

items.description: Three eggs with thin-sliced grilled beef with stir onions, green peppers and swiss cheese.

items: Soda (Coke, Zero Coke, Sprite, Mt. Dew)
